Agape Sovereign AI

Take back control of your digital life. Agape Sovereign AI is an advanced privacy and identity protection platform that scans, monitors, and defends your personal data across 16 identity vectors — from email breaches and dark web exposure to data broker listings and AI biometric risks.

PLATFORM CAPABILITIES

Everything you need to reclaim your identity

Digital Identity Protection

16-vector identity scanning across email, social, device, financial, and dark web surfaces.

Continuous Breach Monitoring

Real-time surveillance of data broker listings, credential leaks, and public exposure.

Client-Side Encryption

AES-GCM zero-knowledge encryption — your data is encrypted before it ever leaves your device.

Architect AI

Sovereign AI assistant that helps you understand, restore, and defend your digital identity.

5-Pillar Shield Platform

Integrated defense across Polymer, Unosecur, Nymiz, PrivacyProctor, and Prisma AIRS.

Erasure Engine

Automated data broker opt-out and removal requests across major aggregators.

Ready to take control?

Sovereign identity protection starts now. No data is stored unencrypted.
